leadPayload.planTitle: Smoke test Ultimate Berlin trip plan
leadPayload.ticket: BER arrival usually needs an ABC ticket before boarding.
leadPayload.travelMode: Now: get central. Next: keep the first route simple. Later: save the World Clock map.
leadPayload.planHealth: Ready: route shape, ticket note, and tour timing are present.
leadPayload.preArrivalChecklist: Save the plan link, check ticket zone, save meeting point, keep one weather fallback.
leadPayload.baseBrief: Base camp: Mitte gives the cleanest first-route start and late return.
leadPayload.budgetPulse: Budget: mix free sights with one paid anchor, keep cash for tips and small stops.
leadPayload.interestLens: History and Wall interests are mapped to central history and East Berlin days.
leadPayload.paceGuard: Balanced pace: one main area per day, one optional extra, protected food break.
leadPayload.weatherStrategy: Use live weather close to arrival and monthly fallback for later dates.
leadPayload.carryPack: Exact link, overview map, tour hold, and PDF backup are ready.
leadPayload.reservationRadar: Book the tour first, check timed museum entries, keep arrival errands light.
leadPayload.planAdvice: Smart fix: avoid scattering the first day across too many areas.
leadPayload.planSwaps: Swap: if rain hits, move one museum or covered market into the same area.
leadPayload.dayRhythm: Day 1 light, Day 2 story/tour, Day 3 Wall and East Berlin.
leadPayload.dayIntelligence: Route, energy, spend, and check chips present for every day.
leadPayload.dayOperations: Start, transit, reserve, and backup notes present for every day.
leadPayload.tourRecommendation: Book the free walking tour early in the trip
